_comment: Claude Mate hooks. Merge the 'hooks' object below into ~/.claude/settings.json. Install the script at ~/.claude/hooks/claude-status.sh and chmod +x it. The StopFailure->error hook ('claudeMateError') is OPTIONAL: StopFailure fires (instead of Stop) when a turn ends on an API error (5xx/overloaded/timeout/rate-limit). If your Claude Code build does not support StopFailure, simply omit the 'claudeMateError' entry — the rest still works. See README for merge instructions.
